Mercedes-Benz Q1 Marked by Solid Cash Generation and Top-End Model Changeovers
Mercedes-Benz Posts Robust Q3 Profit in a Demanding Environment

holdings.infoBox: EPS is an equity ETF with a total of 503 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.29%, Alphabet at 6.45%, Amazon.com at 5.84%, Apple at 5.25%, and Microsoft at 3.59%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. LargeCap Fund (EPS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree U.S. LargeCap index. The fund tracks an earnings-weighted index of the 500 largest US companies that have generated positive earnings in the past calendar year. EPS was launched on Feb 23, 2007 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: Manhattan Associates Reports Record Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Manhattan announces Q4 2024 earnings results.
